mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate applied to future equity cash flows, systematically reducing present valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in rising rate periods are not significantly lower than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate crossing above 5.0 percent signals deteriorating labor market conditions, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in greater than 60 percent of triggered instances despite the negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising auto sales and falling housing starts indicates sector rotation away from broad cyclicals, pressuring aggregate market returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant with p-value greater than 0.10 in out-of-sample regression.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth exceeding two percent annualized signals supply-side capacity utilization tightening, driving positive equity returns during expansion phases.
failure_condition: Signal direction flips to negative during recessionary periods when the regime filter is not applied.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month CPI inflation exceeding 0.4 percent signals accelerating price pressures, prompting capital flight from equities to inflation-hedging assets.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day forward returns occur in more than 55 percent of high-inflation trigger observations.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained payroll employment growth reflects broad economic strength and rising consumer spending, supporting corporate earnings and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Sixty-day forward returns show no significant positive correlation with payroll growth with t-statistic below 1.5.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth falling below one percent annualized signals severe demand contraction, leading to earnings downgrades and negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive returns are observed in greater than 55 percent of sub-one-percent GDP growth observations.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous decline in industrial production and rise in unemployment confirms a broad economic slowdown, triggering immediate risk-off positioning and negative returns.
failure_condition: Joint signal fails to outperform single-series signals in out-of-sample backtest with Sharpe ratio difference below 0.2.
